Backend/pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 17 to 21 to target the new JDK.
Backend/pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project continues to compile and run against Java 17, failing to utilize Java 21 features or enforce Java 21 compatibility.

Backend/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Lombok dependency to a version compatible with Java 21.
Backend/pom.xml.why_exists: Older versions of Lombok may fail to compile or process annotations correctly on Java 21 due to internal API changes or lack of support.

Backend/pom.xml.general_idea: Configure the Maven compiler plugin to use the release flag matching the Java version property.
Backend/pom.xml.why_exists: Without this configuration, the compiler might not strictly enforce bytecode compatibility with the target Java version, potentially leading to runtime issues on Java 21.
